title: Out-of-range --date-range raises uncaught ValueError traceback
evidence: parse_date_range/parse_partial_date raise ValueError on 2026-13 / 2026-02-30; main() has no top-level guard; zoom_meeting_manager.py:606,3541,3236
impact: Ugly traceback instead of a clean error message for a common user mistake
recommended_action: Catch invalid date input and exit with a clean ERROR message (SystemExit)

title: Non-object model JSON crashes render_summary_text with AttributeError
evidence: parse_json_response accepts a JSON array/number; validate_summary_output only warns (non-fatal); render_summary_text does model_out.get on a non-dict -> AttributeError; zoom_meeting_manager.py:3049,1287,3041
impact: A malformed-but-valid-JSON model reply aborts a summarize run with a traceback
recommended_action: Guard: if model output is not a dict, treat as a model error (save diagnostic, skip/fail item) instead of crashing
validation: Add unit test feeding a list payload

title: cmd_clean ProgressReporter total includes skipped records (inflated ETA/cost)
evidence: total=len(selected) counts records later skipped (no merged / resume / existing output); progress.start/finish only on processed items; zoom_meeting_manager.py:2546-2548
impact: ETA and projected cost during clean are overstated; --max truncates pre-filter list
recommended_action: Size ProgressReporter from the actually-processable set (mirror cmd_summarize which builds to_process first)

title: init can write config containing a literal API key at 0644
evidence: init writes config file at default perms; world-readable key warning only covers {file:} keys not zmm config; lane A A4
impact: A secret stored in a world-readable config is a local privacy risk
recommended_action: chmod 600 the written config when it contains a literal api_key, or warn

title: base_url with http:// scheme sends API key in cleartext without warning
evidence: client_for/_make_client accept any base_url; no scheme check; lane A A5
impact: Operator could unknowingly send keys over plaintext HTTP
recommended_action: Warn (once) if base_url uses http:// (non-localhost)

title: _error_hint operator-precedence fragility for not-found detection
evidence: 'model' in msg and 'not' in msg binds as ('model' in msg) and ('not' in msg); lane A A6
impact: Mis-categorized hint in rare messages; cosmetic
recommended_action: Parenthesize the condition

title: --max accepts 0/negative without validation
evidence: --max type=int unvalidated; 0 or negative could behave oddly via slicing; lane A A7
impact: Minor; slicing with negatives truncates unexpectedly
recommended_action: Validate --max >= 1 or document slice semantics

title: _LAST_USAGE module global couples cost accounting to serial execution
evidence: module-global set by _extract_content; safe today (serial loops) but a latent footgun if parallelized; lane A A9
impact: Future risk only
recommended_action: Document the assumption with a comment; no change now

title: cmd_estimate has no end-to-end test (5% line coverage)
evidence: lane B T1; only parser-routed, command body unexercised
impact: Estimate command regressions could ship unnoticed
recommended_action: Add a cmd_estimate test with monkeypatched costs + tmp tree

title: cmd_list --has / missing-summaries not exercised end-to-end (cmd_list 37%)
evidence: lane B T2; only filter helpers unit-tested
impact: Command wiring regressions possible
recommended_action: Add cmd_list end-to-end tests for --has and missing-summaries

title: cmd_extract search/me paths ~50% covered
evidence: lane B T3
impact: Local search regressions possible
recommended_action: Add extract search/me tests

title: Generated summary .json not validated against schemas/summary.json in tests
evidence: lane B T4 / lane D SCH; only key-presence checked
impact: Schema drift between code output and published schema could go unnoticed
recommended_action: Add a test validating a generated payload against the schema (jsonschema if available else key+type check)

title: Cost/progress tests read machine-local opencode.json (non-hermetic)
evidence: test_progress_reporter_timing_fields uses real _load_model_costs; _cost_rate substring match; lane B T5
impact: Tests could behave differently across machines/CI
recommended_action: Add autouse fixture neutralizing _load_model_costs (or patch in the timing test)

title: No end-to-end truncation regression at cmd_summarize
evidence: lane B R1; only helper tested
impact: Truncation handling at command layer could regress
recommended_action: Add cmd_summarize truncation test

title: Tag vs CHANGELOG incoherence: v0.1.0 tag precedes 7 feature commits folded under [0.1.0]
evidence: lane C D1; tag at 7f11db6; README release proc references nonexistent [Unreleased]
impact: Users/maintainers see a tag that doesn't match shipped CHANGELOG content
recommended_action: Recommend: keep an [Unreleased] section OR retag; at minimum align README release procedure and CHANGELOG (record decision; do not retag without permission)

title: Several real flags undocumented in README
evidence: lane C D2; --prompt-context/-person/-correction, --summarization-source, --only-cleaned-transcripts, --ignore-model-errors absent from README flags
impact: Discoverability gap
recommended_action: Add the missing flags to README flag list

title: Two flags ship with empty help text
evidence: lane C D3; --summarization-source and --only-cleaned-transcripts have empty help
impact: Poor CLI help UX
recommended_action: Add concise help strings

title: README 'list missing' choices omit summary-json/transcripts
evidence: lane C D4
impact: Docs incomplete vs actual choices
recommended_action: Update README list-missing choices

title: Three --prompt-* flags are functionally identical (collapse candidate)
evidence: lane C U1; all appended to one list at zoom_meeting_manager.py:1071-1074
impact: Redundant surface; mild confusion
recommended_action: Collapse into --prompt-layer (deferred per user)

title: Deferred flag renames (--clobber/--show-stale/--summarization-source)
evidence: lane C U2; prior session deferred
impact: Naming clarity
recommended_action: Rename later before public release

title: Single 3.5k-line module
evidence: lane C M1; tracked as P5-M2 in TODO
impact: Onboarding/maintenance friction
recommended_action: Package split tracked for future

title: CI matrix omits Python 3.14 (dev runs 3.14)
evidence: lane D CI1; .github/workflows/ci.yml matrix 3.10-3.13; suite passes on 3.14
impact: CI doesn't cover the version actually used; 3.14 regressions could slip
recommended_action: Add 3.14 to matrix + classifier

title: CI installs deps manually instead of pip install .[dev]; never installs package
evidence: lane D CI2; ci.yml step pip install pytest pytest-cov tiktoken
impact: Packaging/entry-point/optional-openai regressions untested
recommended_action: Install via .[dev]; add an install/build smoke job

title: CI never builds/installs the wheel (packaging untested in CI)
evidence: lane D CI3; installed-metadata test skipped
impact: Packaging regressions ship unnoticed
recommended_action: Add a build job (python -m build) + import check

title: Runtime summary validation is key-presence only (no type/enum/nested checks)
evidence: lane D SCH; validate_summary_output checks top-level keys only
impact: Subtle malformed model output (wrong types) not flagged at runtime
recommended_action: Optionally validate with jsonschema when available; keep best-effort

title: deprecated/ predecessor scripts tracked in repo
evidence: lane A A11 / lane C DEP1 / lane D confirmed excluded from wheel & sdist
impact: Repo clutter; potential confusion
recommended_action: Keep for provenance OR remove; correctly excluded from build

title: Diagnostics persist transcript PII to disk
evidence: lane A A8; invalid-response/schema-warnings diagnostics include transcript-derived content
impact: Local PII at rest in Diagnostics/
recommended_action: Document in README that Diagnostics may contain transcript content
